title: Tally
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 15.5 (ADR-005 item 5 consolidates 'Tally Service'/'Result Publication Service' into tally-service). Owned by tally-service (epd2_tally_service.domain.Tally). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control (ADR-009 item 15: aggregate counts + hash-only audit-chain proof, never vote contents): account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema (epd2_tally_service.domain.FORBIDDEN_FIELD_NAMES). `result_data` is a plain per-option vote-count breakdown (Mapping[str, int]) - this service's own documented judgment call for a shape canon leaves open. tally-service never imports epd2_voting_service (ADR-008 item 3) - every field here is either caller-supplied or computed from caller-supplied plain parameters, never derived from a real VoteEnvelope this service reads itself.
